seoTitle: Tuckurimba vs Tuggerah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tuckurimba and Tuggerah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tuckurimba and Tuggerah.
heading: Tuckurimba vs Tuggerah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tuckurimba, New South Wales and Tuggerah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tuckurimba has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tuggerah (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tuckurimba or Tuggerah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tuckurimba has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Tuggerah scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tuckurimba scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Tuggerah scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tuckurimba or Tuggerah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tuckurimba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
